seoTitle: Bumbaldry vs Bumbalong — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Bumbaldry and Bumbalong. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Bumbaldry and Bumbalong.
heading: Bumbaldry vs Bumbalong — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Bumbaldry, New South Wales and Bumbalong, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Bumbalong has a lower overall climate risk score (33/100) compared to Bumbaldry (34/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Bumbaldry or Bumbalong safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Bumbaldry has a flood risk score of 27/100, while Bumbalong scores 26/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Bumbaldry scores 41/100 for bushfire risk. Bumbalong scores 53/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Bumbaldry or Bumbalong?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Bumbalong has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 0.6% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
